title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at EazyDiner

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at EazyDiner
jsonLd.description:
We at EazyDiner are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About EazyDiner:
EazyDiner is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EazyDiner!
